name: VMM CRM - Get Complaint by Number

parameters.jsCode:
const q = $input.first().json.query || {};
const complaintno = (q.complaintno || '').toString().replace(/'/g, "''").trim();
if (!complaintno) return [{ json: { error: 'complaintno required' } }];

const sql = `
SELECT
  c.id          AS complaintid,
  c.complaintno,
  c.productname,
  c.vendorname,
  c.natureofproblem,
  c.typeofcomplaint,
  c.productlocation,
  cs.storecode,
  cs.storename,
  cs.storeemail,
  cs.fmname,
  cs.fmemail,
  cs.fmmobileno,
  cs.storeregion,
  cs.statename,
  cs.storecity,
  ve.closuredate AS edcdate,
  cl.status      AS current_status,
  cl.remarks
FROM vmm_complaints c
JOIN vmm_complaintstores cs ON cs.id = c.storerefid
LEFT JOIN vmm_vendorescalations ve
  ON ve.complaintid = c.id
  AND ve.id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM vmm_vendorescalations WHERE complaintid = c.id)
LEFT JOIN vmm_complaintlogs cl
  ON cl.id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM vmm_complaintlogs WHERE complaintid = c.id)
WHERE c.complaintno = '${complaintno}'
  AND c.is_deleted = 'No'
LIMIT 1`;

return [{ json: { sql, complaintno } }];
